mapper.sql: select competition_id, competition_name, category, category_name, description, apply_start_time, apply_end_time, start_time, end_time, status, organizer, host, max_participants, current_participants, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from competition
select apply_id, competition_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, apply_time, audit_status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from competition_apply
mapper.select:
where del_flag = '0'
and competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc

select c.competition_id, c.competition_name, c.category, c.category_name, c.description, c.apply_start_time, c.apply_end_time, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.status, c.organizer, c.host, c.max_participants, c.current_participants, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, ca.apply_time from competition c inner join competition_apply ca on c.competition_id = ca.competition_id where c.del_flag = '0' and ca.user_id = #{userId} and ca.del_flag = '0' order by ca.apply_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into competition( competition_id, competition_name, category, category_name, description, apply_start_time, apply_end_time, start_time, end_time, status, organizer, host, max_participants, current_participants, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time )values( #{competitionId}, #{competitionName}, #{category}, #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{applyStartTime}, #{applyEndTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{organizer}, #{host}, #{maxParticipants}, #{currentParticipants}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: update competition set competition_name = #{competitionName}, category = #{category}, category_name = #{categoryName}, description = #{description}, apply_start_time = #{applyStartTime}, apply_end_time = #{applyEndTime}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, organizer = #{organizer}, host = #{host}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, current_participants = #{currentParticipants}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where competition_id = #{competitionId}
mapper.delete: update competition set del_flag = '2' where competition_id = #{competitionId}

update competition set del_flag = '2' where competition_id in
#{competitionId}
mapper.select: where competition_id = #{competitionId} and user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: update competition_apply set del_flag = '2' where apply_id = #{applyId}
update competition_apply set del_flag = '2' where competition_id = #{competitionId} and user_id = #{userId}
